description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:sid Docker image and three stages: lint, build, and test. Add a lint job that runs `apt-get update && apt-get install -y pylint` then `find . -iname "*.py" | xargs pylint`. Add a build job that runs `apt-get update && apt-get install -y flit python3-pip`, then `PIP_BREAK_SYSTEM_PACKAGES=1 FLIT_ROOT_INSTALL=1 flit install`, then `rename-flac --help`. Add a test:integration job in the test stage that runs `apt-get update && apt-get install -y python3 flac`, then `python3 rename_flac.py "%a - %b - %c - %d - %g - %n - %t" tests`, then `test -e "tests/Artist - Album - Composer - Date - Genre - Tracknumber - Title.flac"`. Add a test:unit job in the test stage that runs `apt-get update && apt-get install -y flac python3-pytest` and `pytest tests`.
